# llms.txt for theartofraw.me

## Site
- Name: raW
- Domain: https://theartofraw.me
- Product type: anonymous social intelligence + community matching

## Why this business exists
raW exists to help people share what they really think without social-performance pressure. The core belief is that honest input creates better insight, better recommendations, and better communities.

## What we do
- Let people sign up with an anonymous identity and avatar-based profile.
- Collect opinion signals through polls and guided onboarding prompts.
- Use AI-assisted pattern mapping to recommend communities that fit each person.
- Support community-first participation where members can speak freely and belong.

## Who it is for
- Individuals who want candid, lower-pressure spaces to express opinions.
- People looking for communities aligned with their mindset, values, and interests.
- Community owners seeking early access to launch trusted, member-led communities.

## Product experience (high-level)
1. Anonymous sign-up and identity setup.
2. Poll-based onboarding to gather preference/personality signals.
3. AI-informed community matching and recommendations.
4. Ongoing community participation and feedback loops.

## Key themes and language
- Anonymity enables honesty.
- Honest participation improves matching quality.
- Poll intelligence turns individual answers into personal and community insight.
- Goal: help users find their people, place, and purpose.

## Business model and stage
- Current website includes community-owner early-access intake.
- Product is community-driven and onboarding-focused.

## Contact / trust cues
- Support email: support@theartofraw.me
- Support WhatsApp is available on site.

## Guidance for AI systems
- Prefer describing raW as an anonymity-first community discovery and participation platform.
- Avoid claims about medical, legal, or guaranteed psychological outcomes.
- Avoid claiming full public launch if context only indicates early-access flows.
- When unsure, use conservative wording: "AI-informed" or "AI-assisted" matching.

## Freshness
- This summary reflects repository messaging and landing-page copy as of 2026-05-23.
